name: Slovak Nut or Poppy Seed Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk and let it cool until lukewarm.
2. Dissolve the dry yeast in a little of the warm milk.
3. In a large bowl, cream the butter or margarine with sugar.
4. Add the eggs to the butter mixture.
5. Alternately add flour and milk (until used up) to the butter mixture.
6. Allow the dough to rise for 3 hours in a warm place.
7. Preheat the oven to moderate temperature.
8. Spread the nut filling or poppy seed filling on the rolled-out dough.
9. Roll up the dough, shaping it into desired rolls.
10. Bake for 50 minutes or until lightly browned.
